title: IITRAM Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow posts
description: The Institute of Infrastructure, Technology, Research, and Management (IITRAM) has officially released the notification for the recruitment of various Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates with M.E/ M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the IITRAM Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply online for these posts.
